src.osir_transform.osir_transform.VRL module

class src.osir_transform.osir_transform.VRL.VRL[source]

Bases: str

src.osir_transform.osir_transform.VRL.extract_vrl_fields(expr: str) → list[str][source]

Return deduplicated .field references from a VRL expression, ignoring string literals.

Supports plain fields (.foo.bar), quoted segments (.”#text”), and mixed chains (.Event.System.EventID.”#text”).

src.osir_transform.osir_transform.VRL.parse_vrl_tag(value: Any) → Any[source]

Bases: str

src.osir_transform.osir_transform.extract_vrl_fields(expr: str) → list[str][source]

Return deduplicated .field references from a VRL expression, ignoring string literals.

Supports plain fields (.foo.bar), quoted segments (.”#text”), and mixed chains (.Event.System.EventID.”#text”).
